name: Amari Owens
ai_summary: Amari Owens is an 18-year-old Georgia candidate with 6+ years of babysitting experience (ages 6 months-13 years) and early childhood education coursework. She demonstrates strong conflict resolution skills and a natural connection with children, though her availability is limited until after May 8th when she finishes school.
